name: xsaas
description: Low-cost SaaS foundation for selling X growth workflows as a membership product.

scripts.check: npm run check:api && npm run check:web
scripts.check:api: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/lib/db.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/models/User.js && node --check src/models/Workspace.js && node --check src/models/Subscription.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/billing.js && node --check src/routes/health.js
